:root {
    --echoes-dimension-space-0: 0px;
    --echoes-dimension-space-25: .125rem;
    --echoes-dimension-space-50: .25rem;
    --echoes-dimension-space-75: .375rem;
    --echoes-dimension-space-100: .5rem;
    --echoes-dimension-space-150: .75rem;
    --echoes-dimension-space-200: 1rem;
    --echoes-dimension-space-250: 1.25rem;
    --echoes-dimension-space-300: 1.5rem;
    --echoes-dimension-space-400: 2rem;
    --echoes-dimension-space-500: 2.5rem;
    --echoes-dimension-space-600: 3rem;
    --echoes-dimension-space-800: 4rem;
    --echoes-dimension-width-0: 0px;
    --echoes-dimension-width-25: .125rem;
    --echoes-dimension-width-50: .25rem;
    --echoes-dimension-width-75: .375rem;
    --echoes-dimension-width-100: .5rem;
    --echoes-dimension-width-150: .75rem;
    --echoes-dimension-width-200: 1rem;
    --echoes-dimension-width-250: 1.25rem;
    --echoes-dimension-width-300: 1.5rem;
    --echoes-dimension-width-400: 2rem;
    --echoes-dimension-width-450: 2.25rem;
    --echoes-dimension-width-500: 2.5rem;
    --echoes-dimension-width-600: 3rem;
    --echoes-dimension-width-700: 3.5rem;
    --echoes-dimension-width-800: 4rem;
    --echoes-dimension-width-5000: 25rem;
    --echoes-dimension-height-100: .25rem;
    --echoes-dimension-height-150: .375rem;
    --echoes-dimension-height-200: .5rem;
    --echoes-dimension-height-400: 1rem;
    --echoes-dimension-height-500: 1.25rem;
    --echoes-dimension-height-600: 1.5rem;
    --echoes-dimension-height-800: 2rem;
    --echoes-dimension-height-900: 2.25rem;
    --echoes-dimension-height-1000: 2.5rem;
    --echoes-dimension-negative-spacing-100: -1px;
    --echoes-dimension-negative-spacing-600: -6px;
    --echoes-dimension-negative-spacing-800: -8px;
    --echoes-border-radius-100: 2px;
    --echoes-border-radius-200: 4px;
    --echoes-border-radius-400: 8px;
    --echoes-border-radius-none: 0px;
    --echoes-border-radius-full: 700px;
    --echoes-font-family-mono: Ubuntu Mono, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", "Courier New", monospace;
    --echoes-font-family-sans: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, Noto Sans, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, Segoe UI Symbol, Noto Color Emoji;
    --echoes-line-height-10: 1rem;
    --echoes-line-height-20: 1.25rem;
    --echoes-line-height-30: 1.5rem;
    --echoes-line-height-40: 1.875rem;
    --echoes-line-height-50: 2.25rem;
    --echoes-line-height-60: 3.125rem;
    --echoes-letter-spacing-default: 0;
    --echoes-letter-spacing-increased: .02em;
    --echoes-letter-spacing-decreased: -.02em;
    --echoes-font-weight-bold: 700;
    --echoes-font-weight-semi-bold: 600;
    --echoes-font-weight-regular: 400;
    --echoes-font-weight-italic-weight: 400;
    --echoes-font-weight-italic-style: italic;
    --echoes-font-weight-medium: 500;
    --echoes-font-size-10: .75rem;
    --echoes-font-size-20: .875rem;
    --echoes-font-size-30: 1rem;
    --echoes-font-size-40: 1.25rem;
    --echoes-font-size-50: 1.5rem;
    --echoes-font-size-60: 2.125rem;
    --echoes-border-width-default: 1px;
    --echoes-text-case-uppercase: uppercase;
    --echoes-text-case-none: none;
    --echoes-text-decoration-none: none;
    --echoes-text-decoration-underline: underline;
    --echoes-typography-text-default-regular: 400 .875rem/1.25rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, Noto Sans, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, Segoe UI Symbol, Noto Color Emoji;
    --echoes-typography-text-default-semi-bold: 600 .875rem/1.25rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, Noto Sans, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, Segoe UI Symbol, Noto Color Emoji;
    --echoes-typography-text-default-bold: 700 .875rem/1.25rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, Noto Sans, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, Segoe UI Symbol, Noto Color Emoji;
    --echoes-typography-text-small-regular: 400 .75rem/1rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, Noto Sans, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, Segoe UI Symbol, Noto Color Emoji;
    --echoes-typography-text-small-medium: 500 .75rem/1rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, Noto Sans, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, Segoe UI Symbol, Noto Color Emoji;
    --echoes-typography-text-small-semi-bold: 600 .75rem/1rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, Noto Sans, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, Segoe UI Symbol, Noto Color Emoji;
    --echoes-typography-text-large-regular: 400 1rem/1.5rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, Noto Sans, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, Segoe UI Symbol, Noto Color Emoji;
    --echoes-typography-text-large-semi-bold: 600 1rem/1.5rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, Noto Sans, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, Segoe UI Symbol, Noto Color Emoji;
    --echoes-typography-heading-xsmall: 700 .75rem/1rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, Noto Sans, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, Segoe UI Symbol, Noto Color Emoji;
    --echoes-typography-heading-small: 700 .875rem/1.25rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, Noto Sans, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, Segoe UI Symbol, Noto Color Emoji;
    --echoes-typography-heading-medium: 600 1rem/1.5rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, Noto Sans, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, Segoe UI Symbol, Noto Color Emoji;
    --echoes-typography-heading-large: 600 1.25rem/1.875rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, Noto Sans, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, Segoe UI Symbol, Noto Color Emoji;
    --echoes-typography-heading-xlarge: 600 1.5rem/2.25rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, Noto Sans, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, Segoe UI Symbol, Noto Color Emoji;
    --echoes-typography-code-default: 400 .875rem/1.25rem Ubuntu Mono, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", "Courier New", monospace;
    --echoes-typography-code-highlight: 700 .875rem/1.25rem Ubuntu Mono, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", "Courier New", monospace;
    --echoes-typography-code-comment: italic 400 .875rem/1.25rem Ubuntu Mono, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", "Courier New", monospace;
    --echoes-typography-others-label: 600 .875rem/1.25rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, Noto Sans, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, Segoe UI Symbol, Noto Color Emoji;
    --echoes-typography-others-label-medium: 500 .875rem/1.25rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, Noto Sans, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, Segoe UI Symbol, Noto Color Emoji;
    --echoes-typography-others-helper-text: 400 .75rem/1rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, Noto Sans, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, Segoe UI Symbol, Noto Color Emoji;
    --echoes-typography-display-default: 600 2.125rem/3.125rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, Noto Sans, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, Segoe UI Symbol, Noto Color Emoji;
    --echoes-focus-border-width-default: 2px;
    --echoes-focus-border-offset-default: 1px;
    --echoes-color-support-black: #000000;
    --echoes-color-support-white: #ffffff;
    --echoes-color-support-transparent: #00000000;
    --echoes-banner-sizes-height: 2.75rem;
    --echoes-badge-sizes-height-small: 1.25rem;
    --echoes-badge-sizes-height-medium: 1.75rem;
    --echoes-form-control-border-radius-default: 8px;
    --echoes-form-control-sizes-height-default: 2.25rem;
    --echoes-layout-aside-width-small: 200px;
    --echoes-layout-aside-width-medium: 300px;
    --echoes-layout-aside-width-large: 400px;
    --echoes-layout-global-navigation-sizes-height-default: 56px;
    --echoes-layout-page-header-sizes-height-collapsed: 56px;
    --echoes-layout-page-header-actions-offset-collapsed: 10px;
    --echoes-layout-sidebar-navigation-sizes-breakpoint-dockable: 1320px;
    --echoes-layout-sidebar-navigation-sizes-width-closed: 3rem;
    --echoes-layout-sidebar-navigation-sizes-width-open: 15rem;
    --echoes-layout-sizes-max-width-default: 1160px;
    --echoes-layout-sizes-max-width-full: 100%;
    --echoes-layout-sizes-min-width-default: 1280px;
    --echoes-sizes-overlays-max-width-default: 25rem;
    --echoes-sizes-overlays-min-width-default: 150px;
    --echoes-sizes-overlays-width-small: 25rem;
    --echoes-sizes-overlays-width-default: 37.5rem;
    --echoes-sizes-overlays-width-wide: 62.5rem;
    --echoes-sizes-overlays-max-height-default: 80vh;
    --echoes-sizes-form-field-small: 150px;
    --echoes-sizes-form-field-medium: 250px;
    --echoes-sizes-form-field-large: 350px;
    --echoes-sizes-form-field-full: 100%;
    --echoes-sizes-buttons-medium: 2rem;
    --echoes-sizes-buttons-large: 2.25rem;
    --echoes-sizes-toggletips-height: 1rem;
    --echoes-sizes-toggletips-width: 1rem;
    --echoes-sizes-typography-max-width-default: 650px;
    --echoes-sizes-logo-height-small: 2rem;
    --echoes-sizes-logo-height-medium: 2.25rem;
    --echoes-sizes-logo-height-large: 2.5rem;
    --echoes-sizes-breadcrumbs-max-width-default: 300px;
    --echoes-offset-dropdown-submenu-panel-vertical: 0px;
    --echoes-offset-dropdown-submenu-panel-horizontal: 8px;
    --echoes-table-sizes-row-min-width-default: 53px;
    --echoes-toast-sizes-width: 25rem
}

@font-face {
    font-family: Material Symbols Rounded;
    font-style: normal;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-display: block;
    src: url(data:font/woff2;base64,) format("woff2")
}

@font-face {
    font-family: Echoes;
    font-style: normal;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-display: auto;
    src: url(data:font/woff2;base64,) format("woff2")
}
